# Art Status — Higgsfield Sprite Pack (M4)

**Generated by Fable, 2026-07-06.** Style anchor locked, consistency gate passed,
**full 36-item set complete** + key art + app icon.

## Complete — 36 / 36 item sprites (`assets/sprites/`)

All items in the MVP table have a sprite, style-matched to the Shop Cat anchor:
warm brown wobble-outline, upper-left golden-hour highlight, soft gouache, honeyed
cream field, chunky readable forms. Consistency gate (kickoff §7 — "any 6 side by side
look like one artist's set"): **pass**. `manifest.json` maps every itemId → file,
0 pending.

Includes the aged-cheese variant (`cheese-wheel-tier-2`) and the two mascots
(`shop-cat` orange tabby; `maneki-neko` white figurine — visually distinct).

## Branding (`assets/branding/`)

- `key-art.png` (848×1264) — cozy general-store interior at golden hour, Shop Cat
  napping under its sign. Title-screen hero. (Minor: model painted some in-world shop
  signage text; charming, ignorable.)
- `app-icon.png` (1024×1024) — Shop Cat on a shelf, rounded-square composition.

## Recipe (locked — reuse for any additions)

- **Model:** `nano_banana_2` (Higgsfield MCP), aspect `1:1`, ~1.5 credits/image @ 1k.
- **Template:** `Cozy storybook video game item sprite, [SUBJECT], hand-painted gouache
  texture, chunky miniature proportions, warm golden-hour lighting from upper left, soft
  rim light, muted warm palette, thick simple readable shapes, slight naive-illustration
  wobble to the lines, warm brown outline, storybook children's book style, no text,
  plain flat soft cream background, centered single object, no shelf`

## Still open (kickoff §7 — optional polish, not blocking)

- **Transparent backgrounds:** sprites render on a flat cream field. Slots are
  wood-brown; for the cleanest look run each through Higgsfield `remove_background`
  (batch pass). Until then cream reads as a soft tile — acceptable for preview.
- **Not yet generated:** variant stages (cheese ×3, bamboo ×3, coupon ×2), shelf frame
  set, wall backdrop day/dusk, combo badge frame(s), catalog stamp frame, coin sprite.
  A single reusable badge/stamp frame beats 20 unique ones (9-slice friendly).

## Integration (Lane B, M4)

`manifest.json` is ready to wire: `itemId → assets/sprites/<file>.png`, with the emoji
glyph map (`src/juice/glyphs.ts`) as fallback for any gaps. The reskin swaps the glyph
render in `ItemSprite`/`ShelfScene` for the sprite — tokens/layout unchanged.
